message.content:
Explore the Android project at d:/llapk. I need to understand:
1. What this app does (read build.gradle.kts and any manifest files)
2. Find all code related to "听写" (dictation mode) - search for Chinese characters 听写 and also English terms like "dictation", "spelling"
3. Find all code related to "查词" (word lookup) - search for 查词, lookup, dictionary, search word
4. Find any logic that might disable or restrict word lookup during dictation mode

Be thorough - check all source files, layouts, and resources.
